data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Performance rating by contractor', but the provided evidence does not include any API endpoints or functionality that confirms this capability. The linked use case outlines various needs but does not provide concrete evidence or checks related to performance ratings, indicating a clear gap in meeting this requirement. Specifically, the absence of any mention of performance ratings in the evidence suggests that this requirement is not covered.
gaps: Performance rating by contractor is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
